---
title: "Hologen"
---

Open online resource for training materials in the the [*Hologen* MSCA
Doctoral Network](https://www.hologen-network.eu/).


Training events:

 * Leuven, Oct 19-23, 2026
 * Turku, May 26-29, 2026
 * Barcelona, Nov 10-14, 2025
 * Copenhagen, May 5-9, 2025

Material for all events are available at the [presentation folder](https://github.com/hologen-network/training/tree/main/docs/material/training_material)

![Hologen](images/hologen-logo-web-1000x160.png){width=20% fig-align="left"}
